# Cloud-CTL Tool Use Benchmark Report

## Tool Definitions

| Tool | CLI Command | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `drive_ls` | `cl drive ls --json` | List files and folders in cloud storage. Maps to `cl driv... |
| `drive_search` | `cl drive search Q --json` | Search for files in cloud storage using Google Drive API ... |
| `email_search` | `cl email search Q --json` | Search emails by query. Maps to `cl email search "Q" --js... |
| `calendar_list` | `cl calendar list --json` | List calendar events in a date range. Maps to `cl calenda... |
| `calendar_calendars` | `cl calendar calendars --json` | List all available calendars. Maps to `cl calendar calend... |
| `sheets_read` | `cl sheets read ID --json` | Read data from a spreadsheet. Maps to `cl sheets read ID ... |

   - The Project Plan document was updated the day before yesterday morning.

   - Meeting notes and a design spec PDF were also updated earlier in the week.
